title: Complex EML Depth-7 Targeted Search
conclusion: The 4.76e-6 Im gap from depth 6 is NOT closed at depth 7 via the current route. Achieving Im=1 requires constructing either pi/2 or pi/tan(1) from {1} via real EML. Best depth-6 gap to pi/tan(1): 4.19e-05. Best depth-6 gap to pi/2: 9.75e-06. Both are small (sub-1e-4) but non-zero. The barrier is the real constructibility of these pi-multiples, which Hermite-Lindemann shows are transcendental. Whether the EL closure contains pi/tan(1) is equivalent to asking whether pi and tan(1) satisfy a specific algebraic relation over the EL field -- OPEN.
open_problem: Is pi/tan(1) in the real EML closure? Equivalently: is i constructible from {1}?
new_result: Depth-6 gap to pi/2 from {1}: 9.7486e-06. This may converge to 0 (density conjecture).
